title: Manager, AI Solutions Engineer
company_focus:
Enterprise AI data platform for building specialized AI at
scale
description:
About Snorkel

At Snorkel, we believe meaningful AI doesn’t start with the
model, it starts with the data.

We’re on a mission to help enterprises transform expert
knowledge into specialized AI at scale. The AI landscape has
gone through incredible changes between 2015, when Snorkel
started as a research project in the Stanford AI Lab, to the
generative AI breakthroughs of today. But one thing has
remained constant: the data you use to build AI is the key
to achieving differentiation, high performance, and
production-ready systems. We work with some of the world’s
largest organizations to empower scientists, engineers,
financial experts, product creators, journalists, and more
to build custom AI with their data faster than ever before.
Excited to help us redefine how AI is built? Apply to be the
newest Snorkeler!

Manager, AI Solutions Engineering — Data-as-a-Service

Locations: New York City, NY (Hybrid); Redwood City, CA
(Hybrid); San Francisco, CA (Hybrid); US (Remote)

About the Role

Snorkel AI is hiring a Manager of AI Solutions Engineering
to build and lead our presales technical team within the
Data-as-a-Service organization. Your team of AI Solutions
Engineers partners with leading AI labs on their most
challenging data problems: scoping training data needs,
designing RL environments, developing evaluation frameworks,
and translating customer research objectives into actionable
technical plans.

This is a player-coach role. Roughly half your time goes to
people leadership (hiring, coaching, developing your team)
and the other half to hands-on technical work on strategic
accounts. You set the technical bar for spec quality and
build the playbooks and processes that let the team scale.
You have real influence over how the function operates, from
process and standards to team culture.

The role also means partnering closely with AE leadership on
pipeline strategy, account coverage, and SE allocation, and
working cross-functionally with Delivery, Research, and
Engineering to ensure smooth handoffs. The right person for
this role is technically deep in AI/ML, has strong presales
instincts, and wants to build a team.

Main Responsibilities

- Recruit, hire, and develop AI Solutions Engineers, coaching
  the team on technical quality, customer engagement, and
  career growth
- Set and maintain the technical bar for specifications,
  evaluation frameworks, and customer deliverables
- Own SE capacity planning and account coverage; partner with
  AE leadership on deal strategy, engagement prioritization,
  and pipeline forecasting
- Establish team processes and playbooks for discovery, spec
  development, and knowledge sharing
- Lead technical conversations on select strategic accounts,
  including scoping, solution design, and partnership with
  customer research teams
- Serve as escalation point for technically complex or high-
  stakes customer situations

Basic Qualifications

- 5+ years of experience in applied ML, AI solutions
  engineering, technical presales, or research-intensive
  customer-facing roles
- 2+ years managing or leading technical individual
  contributors, ideally in a presales or solutions
  engineering org
- Strong expertise in frontier AI concepts including LLMs,
  training data pipelines, evaluation methodologies, post-
  training techniques (RLHF, DPO, RLAIF), and domain areas
  such as coding agents, reasoning, multimodal models, or RL
  environments
- Experience operating against revenue or pipeline goals in a
  GTM organization
- Excellent communication skills, able to coach a team,
  partner with sales leadership, and engage credibly with
  customer researchers
- B.S. in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or related field

Preferred Qualifications

- Track record of hiring and developing technical talent
- Experience operating against revenue or pipeline goals in a
  GTM organization
- Ability to work in a fast-moving environment, comfortable
  with ambiguity and rapid iteration

Compensation

The salary range is $190,000 - $260,000 USD Variable and
equity also available for this role.

Be Your Best at Snorkel

Joining Snorkel AI means becoming part of a company that has
market proven solutions, robust funding, and is scaling
rapidly — offering a unique combination of stability and the
excitement of high growth. As a member of our team, you'll
have meaningful opportunities to shape priorities and
initiatives, influence key strategic decisions, and directly
impact our ongoing success. Whether you're looking to deepen
your technical expertise, explore leadership opportunities,
or learn new skills across multiple functions, you're fully
supported in building your career in an environment designed
for growth, learning, and shared success.

Snorkel AI is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity
employer and is committed to building a team that represents
a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills. Snorkel
AI embraces diversity and provides equal employment
opportunities to all employees and applicants for
employment. Snorkel AI prohibits discrimination and
harassment of any type on the basis of race, color,
religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status,
genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation,
gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic
protected by federal, state, or local law. All employment is
decided on the basis of qualifications, performance, merit,
and business need.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are
provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job
application or interview process, to perform essential job
functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of
employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Salary Range

$200,000—$260,000 USD

ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a presales/solutions engineering leadership role
that involves direct hands-on work scoping training data
needs, designing RL environments, developing evaluation
frameworks, and translating research objectives into
technical plans for AI labs. While customer-facing, it
requires deep expertise in LLMs, RLHF, DPO, training data
pipelines, and evaluation methodologies - core AI/ML work.
